title: Termination of appointment of parenting coordinator
doc_html:
§358.8.  Termination of appointment of parenting coordinator

For good cause shown, the court, on its own motion, on motion of a party, or upon request of the parenting coordinator, may terminate the appointment of the parenting coordinator.

Acts 2007, No. 265, §1.
